mechanism: If growth cannot do the deleveraging work (impaired by demographics), either inflation must do more (pushing toward 5-6%), deleveraging takes much longer, or repression becomes more prolonged. The missing growth channel forces reliance on the repression channel.
regime_dependence: Holds when debt/GDP ratios require reduction. If policy accepts permanently higher debt/GDP, the relationship weakens. AI productivity could partially substitute for missing growth.
